name: @chee/patchwork-llm
description: LLM toolkit for Patchwork tools: a <dialog> model picker, a refresh-surviving SharedWorker that runs local (transformers.js) / OpenRouter / Ollama generation, and a streaming API that carries rich telemetry — next-token predictions, temperature, tokens/sec — alongside the text so you can build UIs that show how the model thinks.
author: chee
